title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 115.311 - Consistent general law to apply to primary elections
text:
115.311.  Consistent general law to apply to primary elections. — All provisions of law not inconsistent with this subchapter shall apply with full force and effect to primary elections.
(L. 1977 H.B. 101 § 10.015) 
Effective 1-01-78
